response.justification: James is a strong senior individual contributor with an impressive breadth of technologies, deep open-source involvement, and genuine Linux/systems experience, but he falls short on two core requirements: the role demands German at C1 minimum while his resume lists German as basic, and it requires proven leadership/team-management experience whereas his background is almost entirely hands-on development with no formal people or project leadership beyond founding a small open-source project. UML, requirements management, and formal architecture governance are also absent.
strengths: Deep open-source and Linux background, including founding and running the GISCollective platform
Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Strong software craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, community teaching)
concerns: German listed as basic — role requires minimum C1 proficiency
No formal leadership, team management, or client-advisory track record
No demonstrated UML, requirements management, or IT security/compliance experience

key_factors.factor: Strong open-source and Linux engineering background
